steps.title: Identify the dual requirement
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize both the duration and purpose of Cohen's and Rodrigues's work—when their preservation efforts began and what mission drives them.

steps.title: Match the requirement to the choices
steps.content:
“Since 2003” establishes the starting point and ongoing duration of their work, while “have worked to preserve Gullah culture through their museums” directly states their purpose.

The remaining choices either lack a specific timeframe for their preservation efforts or shift focus to the Gullah people's history and public museum experience rather than the preservationists' work itself.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
